response.task: Transform raw data into actionable insights through a structured analysis pipeline

solution_steps.description: Identify and handle missing values, outliers, and inconsistent formats. Use imputation strategies (mean/median/mode or predictive models) and robust scaling for numeric features.
anti_patterns_avoided: Training on uncleaned data with outliers and missing values

solution_steps.description: Generate engineered features (e.g., interaction terms, polynomial features), encode categorical variables using target or frequency encoding, and create date/time decompositions. Apply dimensionality reduction if necessary.

Split data into training/validation/test sets with stratification. Train baseline models (e.g., linear regression, random forest) and tune hyperparameters using cross-validation. Store model artifacts and versioned pipelines.
anti_patterns_avoided: Data leakage from improperly handled NaN values

solution_steps.description: Assess models on validation and test sets using appropriate metrics (RMSE, MAE, R² for regression; AUC, F1 for classification). Perform residual analysis, calibration checks, and fairness audits if applicable.

Compile a reproducible report: data summary statistics, cleaning steps, feature importance plots, model performance tables, and actionable insights. Include visualizations (scatter plots, SHAP values) to explain predictions.

anti_patterns_avoided: Training models on uncleaned data with outliers and missing values
Data leakage from improperly handled NaN values

output.internal_reasoning: The solution follows the sequential recipe, addresses the critical anti-patterns by cleaning before modeling, and includes all required agents with concrete steps.

task_reasoner.response: A Data Analysis Pipeline Seed Recipe is a reusable, modular blueprint that guides the creation of end‑to‑end analytics workflows. It encapsulates best practices for data ingestion, cleaning, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring while avoiding common anti‑patterns such as hard‑coded paths, monolithic scripts, and opaque logging. The recipe is structured into distinct stages: (1) Source discovery & metadata capture; (2) Ingestion & validation with schema enforcement; (3) Transformation pipeline built on a declarative DSL or DAG tool; (4) Feature store integration for reproducibility; (5) Model training harnessed by automated hyper‑parameter search; (6) Evaluation with statistical tests and drift detection; (7) Packaging into containerized services; (8) Continuous monitoring with alerting and rollback hooks. Each stage is parameterized, version‑controlled, and documented, enabling teams to instantiate new pipelines quickly while maintaining auditability and compliance.
task_reasoner.internal_reasoning: I synthesized industry-standard pipeline patterns from data engineering literature, identified common pitfalls, and mapped them into a modular recipe that balances flexibility with governance.

YOUR ANALYSIS:
A Data Analysis Pipeline Seed Recipe is a reusable, modular blueprint that guides the creation of end‑to‑end analytics workflows. It encapsulates best practices for data ingestion, cleaning, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring while avoiding common anti‑patterns such as hard‑coded paths, monolithic scripts, and opaque logging. The recipe is structured into distinct stages: (1) Source discovery & metadata capture; (2) Ingestion & validation with schema enforcement; (3) Transformation pipeline built on a declarative DSL or DAG tool; (4) Feature store integration for reproducibility; (5) Model training harnessed by automated hyper‑parameter search; (6) Evaluation with statistical tests and drift detection; (7) Packaging into containerized services; (8) Continuous monitoring with alerting and rollback hooks. Each stage is parameterized, version‑controlled, and documented, enabling teams to instantiate new pipelines quickly while maintaining auditability and compliance.

Solve the task using only your own analysis.
You have no previously learned recipes, anti-patterns, or path knowledge.
